pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 85 and export_result.sh line 69: name == 'Provider_Enrichment'

privileged_info_summary: Task creates a NextGen Connect channel named 'Provider_Enrichment' that reads HL7 ADT messages from /home/ga/inbound_hl7 and writes enriched output to /home/ga/outbound_hl7. Reference data is stored in /home/ga/reference/providers.csv (format: ProviderID,LastName,FirstName). Setup script synthetically generates 8 providers with random names and 8 corresponding HL7 messages. The task demonstrates caching CSV reference data in the Global Channel Map during deployment to avoid file I/O in transformers.
